## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest -m "not e2e"` passes
- [ ] New/changed behaviour documented in README or docs/
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies, or justified in the description
- [ ] Tool docstrings updated (they are the agent-facing API)
